inputs.text_0: igcflr Architectural interior photography of a sleek contemporary hotel atrium, an avant‑garde boutique lounge with post‑modernist flair, featuring raw plaster walls in dusty rose and pale salmon undertones, polished terrazzo floors that reflect soft ombre coral pink and powder blue lights, custom-painted fiberglass fixtures suspended from sweeping groin vault ceiling arches that curve geometrically across the space; the lighting is diffuse and uniform across the panelled ceiling, casting gentle indirect shadows along accent walls, all framed in a minimal art‑gallery style composition with a clean one‑point perspective looking straight down the vaulted centerline axis.
